trigger: End of a high-change day or multi-PR gate chain.
A SharePoint site must become an operating system.
A front needs a human execution queue.
Microsoft structures must converge without duplicates.
A TCU pattern must be adapted to TGE.
Real cases need limited live operation.
A dummy circuit passed and real lot is requested.
Live files or records must be read without export.
A high-change chain or retrospective asks to learn skills and harden execution-first posture.
